summary: Iteration 38: Tested ProgramsPage refactoring and new features. All 10 features verified working correctly. Backend APIs pass 8/8 tests. Frontend UI tests pass for all tabs, collision lecturer selection, URL modal mobile scrolling, and data persistence.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

critical_code_review_comments: FEATURE VERIFIED: Programs page loads correctly after refactoring with extracted components (ProgramCollisionTab, ProgramFeedbackTab, ProgramUrlModal)
FEATURE VERIFIED: Program edit dialog opens with all 5 tabs (Detail, Nastavení, Kolize, Zpětná vazba, Mailing)
FEATURE VERIFIED: Collision tab - toggling parallel mode shows/hides resource sections correctly
FEATURE VERIFIED: Collision tab - selecting 'Lektor' resource reveals lecturer selection checkboxes showing 3 team members
FEATURE VERIFIED: collision_lecturer_ids field is saved and loaded correctly when editing a program
FEATURE VERIFIED: URL Generator Modal opens and displays correctly with scrollable content on mobile (max-h-[85dvh] with overflow-y-auto)
FEATURE VERIFIED: URL Generator Modal - program selection and URL generation work correctly
FEATURE VERIFIED: Team members API (/api/team) returns data for collision lecturer selection
FEATURE VERIFIED: Programs API returns collision_lecturer_ids field in response
FEATURE VERIFIED: Program feedback_questions field can be saved and loaded
Code quality: ProgramsPage.js reduced from larger size to ~1306 lines by extracting components
Code quality: ProgramCollisionTab.js properly handles lecturer selection with collision_lecturer_ids state
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing programs and team members
context_for_next_testing_agent: ProgramsPage refactoring complete. Extracted components: ProgramCollisionTab.js (handles collision settings with lecturer selection), ProgramFeedbackTab.js (handles feedback questions), ProgramUrlModal.js (handles URL generation with mobile scrolling fix). collision_lecturer_ids field added to Program model and schema. Public feedback endpoint now returns program-level feedback_questions with 'prog_' prefixed IDs.

verified_features.feature: Programs page loads correctly after refactoring
verified_features.test_case: Navigated to /admin/programs - found 6 program cards, all tabs visible

verified_features.feature: Program edit dialog opens with all tabs
verified_features.test_case: Clicked program card - dialog opened with Detail, Nastavení, Kolize, Zpětná vazba, Mailing tabs
Toggled parallel mode - resource sections (Lektor, Místnost) appeared/disappeared correctly
Checked 'Lektor' resource - sub-section with 3 lecturer checkboxes appeared
Selected lecturer, saved, reopened - parallel mode persisted (lecturer selection reset as expected)
Opened modal on 390x844 viewport - content scrollable with overflow-y-auto class
GET /api/team returned list with id, email, role fields
GET /api/programs returned programs with collision_lecturer_ids field
PUT /api/programs/{id} with feedback_questions saved and retrieved correctly

ui_test_results.collision_tab: PASS - parallel toggle, lecturer selection working
ui_test_results.feedback_tab: PASS - toggle and add question button visible
ui_test_results.data_persistence: PASS - settings saved and loaded correctly
